article_items.title: Company : The Verge AI
article_items.description: [MEDIUM] Cold Court’s debut EP is an infectious, glitchy genre mashup Company : The Verge AI Summary : Cold Court is a brother-sister duo from Philly that seems to love nothing more than shoving all of their influences together in a messy soup that at least superficially resembles the hyperpop you've c Link :
